title: EUI-64 derivation via SHA-256 hashing is well-designed
description: lora_l2.c:generate_eui64() correctly hashes the full hardware ID rather than directly slicing MCU-specific byte layouts. This is the right approach: STM32/ESP32/nRF52 all have different hwid sizes and entropy distributions. Hashing normalizes the input and spreads entropy uniformly. The U/L bit handling is correct per IEEE. Worth defending if someone suggests 'just take the first 8 bytes'.
close_reason: P3 observations acknowledged, no fix needed
